subtitle: Supervised outbound calling for bureaucratic work.
taskPromptPlaceholder: Example: Call the insurer, ask for the status of case 1234, navigate the IVR, and request the latest update politely.
workspaceSubtitle: Monitor drafts, active calls, and completed outcomes in one place.
callListErrorDescription: The workspace could not refresh from the backend. You can still prepare a new outbound task.
callListEmptyDescription: Start with a destination number and a clear objective. Your recent sessions will appear here.
transcriptDescription: Speech recognition results and generated responses appear here as the call progresses.
transcriptEmptyDescription: When a live call starts, utterances will appear here with timing and speaker labels.
browserAgentSubtitle: Practice the conversation directly in the browser before dialing a real company.
browserAgentHelper: Use text or the microphone to test the assistant live.
browserAgentEmptyDescription: Ask the assistant to play the company representative or rehearse the exact task prompt before placing a call.
browserAgentPlaceholder: Say or type what you want the agent to respond to...
browserAgentVoiceHint: Microphone input uses the browser speech APIs when available.
selectCallHint: Choose a call to inspect state changes, transcript history, and takeover controls.
composeSubtitle: Set the number, language, disclosure posture, and task context before the assistant dials out.
composeFooter: Calls stay supervised. You can monitor the transcript and take over whenever needed.
callBasicsDescription: Enter the destination and the exact administrative outcome you want the assistant to reach.
agentBehaviorDescription: Choose the operator-facing language, disclosure posture, and whether the call should be recorded.
heroTitle: A calmer control room for bureaucratic calls
heroDescription: Prepare calls, monitor progress, and rehearse the assistant in one interface built for supervised, production-ready workflows.
heroFooter: Built for a single operator workflow with bilingual support, transcript visibility, and clean handoff controls.
callActionsDescription: Escalate to a human, join from the browser, or terminate the live session.
liveEventsDescription: Recent webhook and orchestration events for this call.
eventsEmptyDescription: Events will start appearing once the outbound flow reaches Telnyx and the orchestration loop becomes active.
